titleStmt.title: SII 20.32: original edition by G. S. Gai
No. 32. (B.K. No. 93 of 1938-39.) See No. 118 below. KUYIBĀL, KUNDGOL TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT.

p.hi: Slab set up near the mosque close to the village Chāvaḍi.

summary.p: The extant details of the date of this badly damaged record are Śaka 967, Pā • • • • •, Uttarāyaṇa-saṁkrānti. The intended date might be A.D. 1045, December 24.
It seems to record a gift to a basadi at Kuyyabāḷa, by certain gāvuṇḍas It mentions Guṇa[bhadra] Siddhāntidēva and his female disciple Mōnimati kanti. The details are all lost.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrīmatparamagaṁbhīrasyādvādāmōghalāṁchanaṁ jēyātraiḷōkyanāthasya śāsanaṁ jina
śāsanaṁ . bhadramastu jinaśāsanasya . bhadraṁ bhūyājjinēṁdrāṇāṁ
kyaṁti dvānasaṁbhṟiḍhā bhānavē .
© svasti samastabhuvanāśraya śrīprithvīvallabhamahārājādhirājaparamēśvaraparamabhaṭṭāra
kaṁ satyāśrayakuḷatiḷakaṁ cāḷukyābharaṇaṁ śrīmatraiḷōkyamalladēvara vijayarājyamu
ttarōttharābhivṟiddhi pravarddhamānamācaṁ
worn out
nōnnataprabhumaṁ
jana cūḍāmaṇi
ranistārakaṁ vitata
janakuṁjara
nukūḻarāgi sakavarśada 967 neya pā
daṁduttarāyaṇa saṁkrānti
ṇḍanuṁ sōbhanagāvuṇḍanuṁ
ḍangembevāḍaṁ kuyyabāḷa
ya saṁgada maḍuvaga
māḍi gēṇakōloḻu savasiya dāriyiṁ baḍagalu paḍuvalu
rageyyiṁ teṁkalu nālvataṁ basadige biṭṭa
mattaru hanneraḍu . mattaṁ baḍagalu
dōṁṭadiṁ teṁkalu biṭṭa gaṇada guṇabhadrasiddhāṁtidē
vara siśśaṁtiyarappa śrī mōnimati kantiyara gaḷappa gauṇḍugaḷu Aṟivattokkalu
mirddu hanneraḍu mattaru keyya jīrṇnōddhārakkaṁ paḍisalikege
salisuttamirpparu pratibālisidavargge vāraṇāsiyoḷu
kurukṣētradoḷu sāsirvva sirvva tapōdhana sāyira kavileya koṭṭi phalama
kku . Ī dharmamaṁ kiḍisidāta vāraṇāsiyoḷu kurukṣētradoḷu sāsirvva
ra sāsirvva kavileya konda pancamahāpātakavakku . sāmānyōyaṁ dharmapētunripāṇāṁ kālē kālē pāla
nīyō bhavadbhiḥ .
Digital edition of SII 20.32 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
